title: T-067 — ReasonInput — add aria-label prop + forwardRef (FT-007)
prompt:
# T-067 — ReasonInput — add aria-label prop + forwardRef (FT-007)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §5.y
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-007** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P2** (S effort)

## Goal
Update ReasonInput to forwardRef<HTMLInputElement> and accept an optional aria-label that, when set, overrides the internal label's visual presence semantics.

## Implementation contract
1. Wrap component in `forwardRef<HTMLInputElement, ReasonInputProps>`.
2. Add `aria-label?: string` to props; when present and `label` is omitted, render input with the aria-label and no visible label.
3. When both `label` and `aria-label` are set, prefer the visible label and warn in dev-only console.
4. Test: focus restoration via ref.current?.focus() works; aria-label is exposed via getByLabelText.

## Files (scope)
- packages/ui/src/ReasonInput.tsx [modify]
- packages/ui/src/__tests__/ReasonInput.test.tsx [modify]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the ReasonInput primitive renders, when compared to the prototype `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/_shared/modals.jsx:73-99` (ReasonInput definition), then literal prototype parity holds for label rendering, min-length counter, audit-log helper text, and error/normal states.
2. Given a parent component captures a ref, when ref.current.focus() is called, then the underlying input receives focus; AND Given existing axe-core tests, when run after the change, then 0 new violations.
3. Given aria-label is set and label is undefined, when rendered, then getByLabelText(aria-label) returns the input.
4. Given both label and aria-label set, when rendered in dev mode, then console.warn fires once.

## Test strategy
- RED: extend ReasonInput.test.tsx with the three new ACs before changing the component.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/ui test ReasonInput`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not break existing label-prop callers.
- Do not introduce ARIA violations.
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (§0 ESLint rule).

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Expose aria-label prop and forwardRef on ReasonInput so callers can wire focus management and label by external content.
pipeline_inputs.details:
The current ReasonInput accepts only an internal `label` prop. Callers (FT-035 Wizard step 2 RHF, audit-trail dialogs) need both forwardRef for focus restoration and aria-label for cases where the label lives outside the component (Field primitive wrap).

AC restructured to include prototype-parity AC by Fixer F7 2026-05-14 (axe-core + ref-focus assertions consolidated; no coverage lost).
out_of_scope: Do not change underlying Field primitive.

Given a parent component captures a ref, when ref.current.focus() is called, then the underlying input receives focus; AND Given existing axe-core tests, when run after the change, then 0 new violations.
Given aria-label is set and label is undefined, when rendered, then getByLabelText(aria-label) returns the input.
Given both label and aria-label set, when rendered in dev mode, then console.warn fires once.
